DOUBLE_IS_LITTLE_ENDIAN_IEEE754.justification: Linux arm64 and Darwin arm64 use little-endian IEEE 754 doubles.

ENABLE_IPV6.justification: IPv6 is required for both supported targets.

HAVE_BROKEN_SEM_GETVALUE.justification: Darwin sem_getvalue behavior is a fixed CPython platform exception.

HAVE_BZLIB_H.justification: The _bz2 module depends on the pinned bzip2 Bazel module.

HAVE_COMPUTED_GOTOS.justification: The selected Clang toolchain compiles computed goto syntax; rules_cc_autoconf cannot execute the upstream runtime test.

HAVE_DEV_PTMX.justification: /dev/ptmx is part of both supported runtime platforms and is not a build-sandbox input.

HAVE_FFI_CLOSURE_ALLOC.justification: The _ctypes module depends on the pinned hermetic libffi build.

HAVE_FFI_PREP_CIF_VAR.justification: The _ctypes module depends on the pinned hermetic libffi build.

HAVE_FFI_PREP_CLOSURE_LOC.justification: The _ctypes module depends on the pinned hermetic libffi build.

HAVE_LZMA_H.justification: The _lzma module depends on the pinned xz Bazel module.

HAVE_WORKING_TZSET.justification: tzset behavior is fixed for the supported glibc and Darwin runtimes; rules_cc_autoconf cannot execute the upstream runtime test.

HAVE_ZLIB_COPY.justification: The zlib module depends on the pinned zlib Bazel module.

HAVE_ZLIB_H.justification: The zlib module depends on the pinned zlib Bazel module.

PACKAGE_BUGREPORT.justification: CPython removes PACKAGE_* definitions to avoid collisions in Python.h consumers.

PACKAGE_NAME.justification: CPython removes PACKAGE_* definitions to avoid collisions in Python.h consumers.

PACKAGE_STRING.justification: CPython removes PACKAGE_* definitions to avoid collisions in Python.h consumers.

PACKAGE_TARNAME.justification: CPython removes PACKAGE_* definitions to avoid collisions in Python.h consumers.

PACKAGE_URL.justification: CPython removes PACKAGE_* definitions to avoid collisions in Python.h consumers.

PACKAGE_VERSION.justification: CPython removes PACKAGE_* definitions to avoid collisions in Python.h consumers.

PTHREAD_SYSTEM_SCHED_SUPPORTED.justification: PTHREAD_SCOPE_SYSTEM is supported by both selected pthread implementations; rules_cc_autoconf cannot execute the upstream runtime test.

PYLONG_BITS_IN_DIGIT.justification: pyport.h supplies CPython's default value when no configure option is selected.

PY_COERCE_C_LOCALE.justification: The Bazel module uses CPython's default C-locale coercion policy.

PY_SQLITE_ENABLE_LOAD_EXTENSION.justification: CPython disables SQLite extension loading unless the configure option explicitly enables it.

PY_SSL_DEFAULT_CIPHERS.justification: The _ssl module uses CPython's default cipher policy with the pinned OpenSSL Bazel module.

PY_SQLITE_HAVE_SERIALIZE.justification: The _sqlite3 module uses serialization provided by the pinned SQLite Bazel module.

PY_SUPPORT_TIER.justification: Linux arm64 is tier 2; Darwin arm64 is tier 2 in CPython 3.12 and tier 1 in CPython 3.13.

Py_HASH_ALGORITHM.justification: pyhash.h supplies CPython's default value when no configure option is selected.

THREAD_STACK_SIZE.justification: Darwin arm64 uses CPython's 16 MiB main-thread stack contract and matching linker option.

WITH_DECIMAL_CONTEXTVAR.justification: The Bazel module uses CPython's default decimal context-variable policy.

WITH_DOC_STRINGS.justification: The Bazel module uses CPython's default documentation-string policy.

WITH_DYLD.justification: Darwin arm64 uses dyld dynamic loading.

WITH_FREELISTS.justification: The Bazel module uses CPython's default freelist policy.

WITH_MIMALLOC.justification: CPython 3.13 enables mimalloc when the selected compiler provides C11 atomics; CPython 3.12 has no mimalloc option.

WITH_PYMALLOC.justification: The Bazel module uses CPython's default pymalloc policy.

_DARWIN_C_SOURCE.justification: CPython defines _DARWIN_C_SOURCE for all supported POSIX builds.

_GNU_SOURCE.justification: Linux arm64 defines _GNU_SOURCE and Darwin arm64 leaves it undefined.

_LARGEFILE_SOURCE.justification: CPython enables large-file declarations on both supported targets.

_NETBSD_SOURCE.justification: CPython defines _NETBSD_SOURCE before all capability checks.

_POSIX_C_SOURCE.justification: Linux arm64 uses 200809L and Darwin arm64 leaves _POSIX_C_SOURCE undefined.

_REENTRANT.justification: Both supported targets use the pthread build.

_XOPEN_SOURCE.justification: Linux arm64 uses 700 and Darwin arm64 leaves _XOPEN_SOURCE undefined.

_XOPEN_SOURCE_EXTENDED.justification: Linux arm64 defines _XOPEN_SOURCE_EXTENDED and Darwin arm64 leaves it undefined.

__BSD_VISIBLE.justification: CPython defines __BSD_VISIBLE before all capability checks.

configure_decisions.name: required_c99_math_functions
configure_decisions.implementation: _required_math_checks() links all eight functions with -lm.
configure_decisions.justification: CPython treats acosh, asinh, atanh, erf, erfc, expm1, log1p, and log2 as required.

configure_decisions.name: dynamic_loading
configure_decisions.implementation: _dynamic_loading_checks() checks dlopen with the platform link options.
configure_decisions.justification: HAVE_DYNAMIC_LOADING follows the actual dlopen result.

configure_decisions.name: posix_shared_memory
configure_decisions.implementation: _posix_shmem_checks() links shm_open and shm_unlink with the platform link options.
configure_decisions.justification: Linux glibc 2.28 requires -lrt; Darwin provides the functions in libSystem.

configure_decisions.name: pty_functions
configure_decisions.implementation: _pty_checks() links openpty, forkpty, and login_tty with the platform headers and libraries.
configure_decisions.justification: Linux uses libutil and Darwin uses libSystem.

configure_decisions.name: cpython_3_13_mimalloc
configure_decisions.implementation: WITH_MIMALLOC follows HAVE_STD_ATOMIC, and Objects/mimalloc sources and headers are declared inputs.
configure_decisions.justification: This matches the CPython 3.13 default; CPython 3.12 has no mimalloc option.

configure_decisions.name: darwin_main_thread_stack
configure_decisions.implementation: THREAD_STACK_SIZE and -Wl,-stack_size,1000000 are set together in cpython.BUILD.bazel.
configure_decisions.justification: CPython requires a 16 MiB main-thread stack on Darwin arm64.

configure_decisions.name: darwin_corefoundation_link
configure_decisions.implementation: POSIX_LINKOPTS and LINKFORSHARED include -framework CoreFoundation.
configure_decisions.justification: This matches CPython's Darwin executable link contract.

configure_decisions.name: linux_system_libraries
configure_decisions.implementation: POSIX_LINKOPTS includes -ldl, -lm, -lpthread, -lrt, and -lutil.
configure_decisions.justification: The selected glibc 2.28 sysroot requires these libraries for the probed interfaces.

configure_decisions.name: zlib_dependency
configure_decisions.implementation: The zlib module depends on the pinned zlib Bazel module.
configure_decisions.justification: Header and function results are dependency contracts rather than host discovery.

configure_decisions.name: bzip2_dependency
configure_decisions.implementation: The _bz2 module depends on the pinned bzip2 Bazel module.
configure_decisions.justification: Header and function results are dependency contracts rather than host discovery.

configure_decisions.name: xz_dependency
configure_decisions.implementation: The _lzma module depends on the pinned xz Bazel module.
configure_decisions.justification: Header and function results are dependency contracts rather than host discovery.

configure_decisions.name: libffi_dependency
configure_decisions.implementation: The _ctypes module depends on the pinned hermetic libffi build.
configure_decisions.justification: ffi_prep_cif_var, ffi_prep_closure_loc, and ffi_closure_alloc follow that dependency.

configure_decisions.name: openssl_dependency
configure_decisions.implementation: The _ssl and _hashlib modules depend on the pinned OpenSSL Bazel module.
configure_decisions.justification: OpenSSL configuration does not inspect host libraries.

configure_decisions.name: sqlite_dependency
configure_decisions.implementation: The _sqlite3 module depends on the pinned SQLite Bazel module.
configure_decisions.justification: PY_SQLITE_HAVE_SERIALIZE follows the pinned SQLite build; extension loading remains disabled.

configure_decisions.name: unsupported_optional_dependencies
configure_decisions.implementation: readline, curses, panel, gdbm, ndbm, uuid, Tcl/Tk, editline, crypt, and external libintl symbols have explicit undefined dispositions.
configure_decisions.justification: The Bazel module does not declare those optional dependency graphs or modules.

configure_decisions.name: unsupported_build_modes
configure_decisions.implementation: debug, shared-libpython, free-threading, statistics, trace-refs, DTrace, Valgrind, framework, universal, and perf-trampoline symbols have explicit undefined dispositions.
configure_decisions.justification: The version tag selects an ordinary static CPython build.

configure_decisions.name: hash_algorithm_default
configure_decisions.implementation: Py_HASH_ALGORITHM remains undefined in pyconfig.h.
configure_decisions.justification: pyhash.h selects CPython's default when no configure option is supplied.

configure_decisions.name: pylong_digit_default
configure_decisions.implementation: PYLONG_BITS_IN_DIGIT remains undefined in pyconfig.h.
configure_decisions.justification: pyport.h selects CPython's default when no configure option is supplied.

configure_decisions.name: sysconfig_generation
configure_decisions.implementation: cpython_sysconfig reads generated pyconfig.h and an explicit Bazel build-variable manifest.
configure_decisions.justification: No Makefile execution or configure output is used.

configure_decisions.name: package_definitions
configure_decisions.implementation: checks.AC_FAIL emits explicit undefined results for all six PACKAGE_* symbols.
configure_decisions.justification: This overrides rules_cc_autoconf builtins and matches CPython's collision-avoidance rule.
